args.query:
SELECT "Index" AS idx,
       SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2018-01-01' AND DATE '2018-12-31'
                AND "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2018-01-01' AND DATE '2018-12-31'
                AND "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM index_trade
GROUP BY "Index";

args.query: SELECT DISTINCT "Date" FROM index_trade WHERE "Index"='NYA' LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Date" FROM index_trade WHERE "Index"='NYA' LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH parsed AS (
  SELECT "Index" AS idx,
         COALESCE(
           try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d'),
           try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
           try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'),
           try_strptime("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p')
         ) AS dt,
         "Open" AS op,
         "Close" AS cl
  FROM index_trade
)
SELECT idx,
       SUM(CASE WHEN dt >= TIMESTAMP '2018-01-01' AND dt < TIMESTAMP '2019-01-01' AND cl > op THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN dt >= TIMESTAMP '2018-01-01' AND dt < TIMESTAMP '2019-01-01' AND cl < op THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM parsed
GROUP BY idx;

exec_args.sql:
WITH parsed AS (
  SELECT "Index" AS idx,
         COALESCE(
           try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d'),
           try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
           try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'),
           try_strptime("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p')
         ) AS dt,
         "Open" AS op,
         "Close" AS cl
  FROM index_trade
)
SELECT idx,
       SUM(CASE WHEN dt >= TIMESTAMP '2018-01-01' AND dt < TIMESTAMP '2019-01-01' AND cl > op THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN dt >= TIMESTAMP '2018-01-01' AND dt < TIMESTAMP '2019-01-01' AND cl < op THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM parsed
GROUP BY idx;

args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_IqZSQ4uAWzvvVPkEvbzQDoy9)
# convert to numeric
for c in ['up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices present: NYA (NYSE Composite, US), IXIC (NASDAQ Composite, US), GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite, Canada)
na = df[df['idx'].isin(['NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE'])].copy()
na['more_up_than_down'] = na['up_days'] > na['down_days']
res = na[na['more_up_than_down']].sort_values('idx')[['idx','up_days','down_days']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))

val_args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_IqZSQ4uAWzvvVPkEvbzQDoy9)
# convert to numeric
for c in ['up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices present: NYA (NYSE Composite, US), IXIC (NASDAQ Composite, US), GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite, Canada)
na = df[df['idx'].isin(['NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE'])].copy()
na['more_up_than_down'] = na['up_days'] > na['down_days']
res = na[na['more_up_than_down']].sort_values('idx')[['idx','up_days','down_days']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))
